fix: resolve MetaProperty lint error by extracting import.meta.env to constants
prs.body: Fixes #10405. This PR resolves the 'MetaProperty could not be resolved' lint error by extracting `import.meta.env` usages to constants in the affected files.

prs.title: feat(core): export native bridge utility functions
prs.body:
# Title: feat(core): export native bridge utility functions

## Description
This PR exports the `isRelativeOrProxyUrl` and `createProxyUrl` utility functions from the native bridge, making them accessible via the `Capacitor` global object. This addresses existing TODOs in the codebase and allows plugins to better handle Capacitor-proxied URLs.

## Changes
- Updated `CapacitorInstance` interface in `core/src/definitions-internal.ts`
- Exported functions in `core/native-bridge.ts`
- Removed TODO comments

## Verification
- Ran `npm run build:nativebridge` to ensure successful build
- Ran `npm test` to ensure no regressions (All tests passed)

Closes #8255

prs.title: fs-poll: mark fs_req as internal
prs.body: This PR addresses the TODO in `src/fs-poll.c` to mark `fs_req` as internal. This ensures that the internal request used by `uv_fs_poll` does not interfere with the loop's active request count.

Fixes #1137

prs.title: Skeletal Loading and nprogress
prs.body:
## Pull Request Overview

This PR adds enhanced loading states by implementing a progress navbar and skeleton loading throughout the application. The changes replace simple CircularProgress spinners with more sophisticated loading indicators that better match the final content structure.

- Implemented NProgress for HTTP request progress indication
- Added react-loading-skeleton for content-aware loading states
- Replaced CircularProgress with skeleton placeholders across multiple components

prs.title: added a page of visitors count
prs.body: closes #29 This visitor counter tracks how many times your website has been visited. It uses Node.js and Express to handle requests and a JSON file to store the total number of visits. Every time someone opens the site, the counter increases by 1 and displays the updated count on the homepage.

issues.title: Lint error: MetaProperty could not be resolved
issues.body: The lint check fails with 'The prop value with an expression type of MetaProperty could not be resolved'. This is likely due to `import.meta` usage in JSX props. I have a fix ready.

issues.title: Export Native Bridge Utility Functions
issues.body:
# Issue Title: Export Native Bridge Utility Functions

## Description
The `native-bridge.ts` file in `@capacitor/core` contains useful utility functions `isRelativeOrProxyUrl` and `createProxyUrl` that are currently internal. There are TODO comments in the code suggesting these should be exported.

Exporting these functions would allow plugins and other parts of the system to correctly handle Capacitor-proxied URLs, improving consistency and reducing code duplication.

## Proposed Solution
- Update `CapacitorInstance` interface in `definitions-internal.ts` to include these methods.
- Attach `isRelativeOrProxyUrl` and `createProxyUrl` to the `Capacitor` global object in `native-bridge.ts`.
- Remove the TODO comments.

## Related Code
- `core/native-bridge.ts`
- `core/src/definitions-internal.ts`

issues.title: fs-poll: mark fs_req as internal
issues.body:
In `src/fs-poll.c`, there is a TODO comment: `/* TODO(bnoordhuis) mark fs_req internal */`.

The `fs_req` used by `uv_fs_poll_t` for `uv_fs_stat` calls is currently treated as a normal request, which increments the loop's active request count. It should be marked as internal to avoid interfering with the loop's active count and to align with how other internal handles/requests are managed.

issues.title: Vitest fails due to missing alias for wasm-inlined in vitest.config.ts
issues.body: While running the test suite with pnpm test, Vitest throws a module resolution error related to the wasm-inlined import. The issue occurs because the wasm-inlined path is not configured in the alias section of vitest.config.ts.
